projectDescription: Interactive, editable documentation designed for AI coding agents with support for MDX components, Excalidraw diagrams, and cloud sync.
keyFeatures: CLI tool for generating AI-powered interactive documentation
Integration with popular coding agents (Cursor, Windsurf, GitHub Copilot, etc.)
Support for MDX components and interactive visualizations
Excalidraw whiteboard integration with Mermaid conversion
Local web server for real-time editing with Tiptap editor
Cloud workspace sync for team collaboration
Data views for structured content display
Automatic agent instruction generation for different IDEs
publicApiSurface: davia init - Initialize Davia in current directory
davia docs - Generate initial documentation with AI agent
davia open - Start local web server to view documentation
davia login - Authenticate with Davia cloud
davia push - Push local documentation to cloud workspace
@davia/agent - AI agent package for documentation generation
@davia/web - Web viewer package for local documentation
write_file - Agent tool for writing content
search_replace - Agent tool for editing files
multi_edit - Agent tool for multiple edits
read_file - Agent tool for reading content
delete_file - Agent tool for deleting files
